questions.question: By noon, I {a1} for two hours.

variants: By noon, I {a1} for two hours.

questions.question: By Friday, she {a1} here for a month.

a1.verb_hint: Focus on duration up to a future point.

variants: By Friday, she {a1} here for a month.

questions.question: By the time you arrive, they {a1} all morning.
